questions.prompt: The sum of all even integers from 2 to 100 inclusive is S. The sum of all odd integers from 1 to 99 inclusive is T.
Line m has equation y = -2x + 7. Point P is at (3, 1).
questions.quantityA: Distance from P to the y-axis
questions.quantityB: Distance from P to line m
questions.explanation: Distance from P(3,1) to y-axis = 3. Distance from P to y=-2x+7 (or 2x+y-7=0): |2(3)+1-7|/√5 = |0|/√5 = 0. P is on line m! So A=3>B=0. A>B.

questions.prompt: a and b are positive. (a + b)/2 = 10 and √(ab) = 8.
A bag contains 3 red and 5 blue marbles. Two drawn without replacement.
n is an integer greater than 1. p = n! and q = (n-1)! + n!
The quadratic ax² + bx + c has roots 2 and -5. a = 1.
In a circle with radius 6, a chord is 3 units from the center.
If x ≠ y and x² - y² = 10(x - y), what is x + y?
questions.explanation: (x-y)(x+y) = 10(x-y). Since x≠y, divide both sides by (x-y): x+y=10.

questions.prompt: A jar has 4 red, 3 blue, and 5 green balls. Three are selected without replacement. What is the probability that at least one is red?
How many integers from 1 to 1000 are divisible by 4 but not by 6?
questions.explanation: Divisible by 4: 250. Divisible by both 4 and 6 (i.e., by LCM=12): 83. Divisible by 4 but not 6: 250-83=167.

questions.prompt: The function f(x) = x³ - ax has an inflection point at x = 0. If f'(1) = 0, what is a?
questions.explanation: f'(x) = 3x²-a. f'(1)=0 → 3-a=0 → a=3. (Inflection at x=0 is automatically satisfied since f''(x)=6x=0 at x=0.)

questions.prompt: In the figure, ABCD is a square with side 10. E is the midpoint of CD. What fraction of the square's area is triangle ABE?
If 5 cards are drawn from a standard 52-card deck, what is the number of ways to get exactly 3 aces?
questions.explanation: Choose 3 aces from 4: C(4,3)=4. Choose 2 non-aces from 48: C(48,2)=1128. Total: 4×1128=4512.
By the telescoping formula, sum = n/(n+1) = 19/20.

questions.prompt: Which of the following functions are one-to-one (injective) on all real numbers? Indicate all that apply.
questions.explanation: f(x)=x³: strictly increasing, injective✓. f(x)=x²+1: f(1)=f(-1)=2, not injective✗. f(x)=2x-7: linear with slope≠0, injective✓. f(x)=|x|: |1|=|-1|=1, not injective✗. f(x)=eˣ: strictly increasing, injective✓.
